C

censorMessage(String) - Method in class com.example.WordFilter
censors banned words from messages
checkCommand(String) - Method in class com.example.Server
checks a string for a command and arguments executes the command with its arguments Commands and their outcomes:
checkMessage(String) - Method in class com.example.Client
checks the message for banned words and commands Calls the censorMessage function to filter banned words Checks message for any commands, and executes them if so

client - Variable in class com.example.ResponseHandler

G

getActiveClients() - Method in class com.example.ServerLog
 
getAddress(Scanner) - Static method in class com.example.App
gets an address from the user and checks its a real ip with regex.
getBrowserPort() - Method in class com.example.Client
gets a port for the browser, iterates until it finds a free one
getClientCache(String) - Method in class com.example.ServerRunnable
sorts which messages the client should be able to see
getClientTag() - Method in class com.example.ServerRunnable
gives the client a tag if it needs one
getContent() - Method in class com.example.Message
 
getHTML() - Method in class com.example.ServerLog
gets the current serverLog as html, containing the timestamp, the number of active clients, the active clients and their related messages, and the whole message history of the server
getIp() - Method in class com.example.Message
 
getMessageHistory() - Method in class com.example.ServerLog
 
getPage() - Method in class com.example.Client
gets the input from the server
getPage() - Method in class com.example.PageConfig
 
getPort() - Method in class com.example.Message
 
getPort(Scanner) - Static method in class com.example.App
asks the user for a port number and checks whether its valid, calls itself if its not
getReciever() - Method in class com.example.Message
 
getSocketAddress() - Method in class com.example.Client
gets the socket address of the client based of the InetAddress and port from toServer.
getString() - Method in class com.example.ServerLog
gets the current serverLog as a string, including the timestamp, the server up time, the number of active clients and their messages, all the messages
getTag() - Method in class com.example.Message
 
getTimestamp() - Method in class com.example.Message
 
getTimestamp() - Method in class com.example.ServerLog
 
getUser(Scanner) - Static method in class com.example.App
asks the user for a username

R

reciever - Variable in class com.example.Message

8000 is a reserved port
response - Variable in class com.example.ResponseHandler
 
ResponseHandler - Class in com.example
ResponseHandler class
ResponseHandler(Client, String) - Constructor for class com.example.ResponseHandler
ResponseHandler constructor
run() - Method in class com.example.Client
Client runnable Contains threads for WebHandler, InputHandler, ResponseHandler
run() - Method in class com.example.InputHandler
runs the InputHandler for either client or server depending how its been initialised
run() - Method in class com.example.ResponseHandler
checks the input each second, if its null or the same as last time it skips if the response isnt a JSON it also skips
run() - Method in class com.example.Server
Starts Logger creates new Server.serverLog Starts serverRunnable thread for each client connected to the socket
run() - Method in class com.example.ServerRunnable
Deals with input and output of server Reads either the messages from client which it evaluates and turns into a json to send to each respective client to view thei messages Or read the http get or post requests for the browser
runningThread - Variable in class com.example.Client
 
runningThread - Variable in class com.example.Server

sortClients() - Method in class com.example.ServerLog
Connects active clients to the messages they've sent
startLogging() - Method in class com.example.Logger
Starts a scheduler to save and update the server logs every 5 minutes Includes the time in each log
stop() - Method in class com.example.Server
Closes socket
stopLogging() - Method in class com.example.Logger
shuts down scheduler
